creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 222009
Update to 1096.60.2

Hi,

As net/mDNSResponder has been updated to 1096.60.2 (beware, the version are quite similar, only the minor release number changed), so should be the related dns/mDNSResponder_nss port (for which I'm maintainer), here is the patch to the port directory.

Nothing special again with this update, this is still very small port, here's the QA report:

/usr/ports/dns/mDNSResponder_nss# portlint   
looks fine.

/usr/ports/dns/mDNSResponder_nss# make check-plist
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)

Thank you in advance!
